title: OG parser does not decode HTML entities in content attributes
description: parse_og_tags() captures raw attribute values via regex ([^"]*) but never decodes HTML entities. A page with <meta property="og:title" content="Tom & Jerry"> will store the title as 'Tom & Jerry' literally. Common entities: & < > ' " and numeric forms ('). Mastodon's parser decodes these. Fix: apply an HTML entity decode pass on extracted content values (htmlescape crate or a small inline decoder for the ~5 common entities).
